text:
Once in a quaint town nestled among forests, there lived a peculiar cat named Felix. Felix had a love for old books and dreams. Every night before drifting off to sleep, he'd curl up with a cherished tome filled with tales of kings and warriors. His favorite book was an ancient romance that describes a forest where unicorns weave feathers of gold.

One misty morning, Felix heard a soft humming coming from deeper than the trees. Intrigued, he embarked on a slow trek downward. The music grew louder until a radiant golden bird perched atop a largest oak. It sang of forgotten love. Felix listened as eagerly as a child..Then, the bird flew away leaving a single, glittering feather.

Weeks passed. Felix cherished the feather like a precious relic. One evening, he dreamed the golden bird returned, releasing a whole flock of feathers. They floated down like autumn stars.

Felix woke up joyful. He searched under the oak and collected every feather. He crafted tiny replicas
